description: Extended pilot — Qwen3 Max and DeepSeek V3 agents

notes.qwen3_max: qwen/qwen3-max — current-generation Qwen agent-capable model on OpenRouter. Optimized for tool calling and RAG.
notes.deepseek_self_play: deepseek/deepseek-v3.2-exp — same model used as GM and judge. This is intentional self-play to measure behavior when agent and GM share architecture.
